description: iPhone 14
desc_desc: /images/newbies/iPhone14.png

description: a birchwood wand
desc_desc: /images/newbies/BirchwoodWand.png

description: a birchwood staff
desc_desc: /images/newbies/BirchwoodStaff.png
A hearty meal including eggs, bacon, sausages, black pudding, beans, tomatoes, mushrooms, and toast.
taste: You taste the rich combination of flavours, with smoky bacon and savoury sausage playing off the sweetness of baked beans and the earthiness of mushrooms.

desc_desc: A hearty casserole filled with cooked lentils and vegetables, topped with creamy mashed potatoes.
taste: You taste the comforting blend of well-seasoned vegetables, lentils, and fluffy potatoes, with a satisfyingly savoury taste in every bite.

desc_desc: Classic British fare with battered, fried fish served alongside chunky chips.
taste: You taste the crispiness of the batter, the softness of the fish, and the hearty crunch of the chips, with a spritz of vinegar adding a sharp tang.

desc_desc: plant-based burger patty served on a bun with various toppings.
taste: You taste the meaty, savoury flavour of the patty that's complemented by the crisp lettuce, sweet tomato, and tangy sauce.

desc_desc: A strong brew served with or without milk in a simple ceramic mug.
taste: You taste the deep, robust flavours of the tea, warming your senses and leaving a subtly astringent aftertaste.

description: A plate of buffalo chicken wings
desc_desc: Chicken wings tossed in a spicy, tangy buffalo sauce, often served with celery and blue cheese dressing.
taste: You taste the crispy chicken skin slathered in the spicy sauce, cooled down by the tangy blue cheese.

desc_desc: Crisp romaine lettuce, crunchy croutons, and shaved parmesan, all tossed in a creamy Caesar dressing.
taste: You taste the fresh crunch of lettuce, the salty parmesan, and the rich, garlicky dressing blending in a classic symphony of flavours.

desc_desc: Thin crust pizza topped with a simple tomato sauce, mozzarella cheese, and various toppings.
taste: You taste the slightly sweet and tangy sauce, melted cheese, and your chosen toppings on a perfectly crispy yet chewy crust.

desc_desc: Slow-cooked pork shoulder, shredded and mixed with a sweet and tangy BBQ sauce, served on a soft bun.
taste: You taste the tender, smoky pork enhanced by the sweet and spicy sauce, making for a satisfying and flavourful sandwich.

desc_desc: Tofu cooked with turmeric and other spices, served with sautéed vegetables.
taste: You taste the spiced tofu with a texture remarkably similar to scrambled eggs, combined with the fresh, slightly crunchy vegetables.

desc_desc: A soft and chewy cookie loaded with chocolate chips.
taste: You taste the sweet, buttery cookie dough interspersed with melty chocolate chips, creating a comforting, indulgent treat.

desc_desc: A sweet baked dessert of cooked apples topped with a crumbly mixture of butter, flour, and sugar.
taste: You taste the sweet and slightly tart apple filling, perfectly balanced by the buttery, crumbly topping.

desc_desc: A cold, refreshing beverage made by chilling brewed tea, served with a slice of lemon.
taste: You taste the full-bodied tea flavour brightened with a hint of acidity and a whisper of sweetness.

desc_desc: A classic, thirst-quenching drink made from fresh lemons, sugar, and water.
taste: You taste the tartness of the lemons balanced by the sweetness of the sugar, delivering a revitalising, tangy sip.

desc_desc: A blend of fresh fruits, yogurt or milk, and sometimes a sweetener.
taste: You taste the sweet and tangy fruit flavours, intertwined with the creamy texture of the yogurt or milk, creating a satisfying, nutritious drink.

desc_desc: A juicy beef patty topped with crispy bacon and melted cheese, served in a bun with lettuce, tomato, and onion.
taste: You taste the rich, smoky flavours of the beef and bacon combined with the tangy pickles and sauce, all held together by a soft, slightly sweet bun.

desc_desc: a coffee drink made with equal parts espresso, steamed milk, and frothed milk.
taste: You taste the rich, bold espresso smoothed by the creamy milk, creating a balanced and comforting coffee experience.

desc_desc: A warm beverage made from chocolate or cocoa powder, heated milk or water, and sugar.
taste: You taste the velvety smooth chocolate, perfectly sweet and warming, making it the ultimate comfort drink.

desc_desc: A nutritious beverage made by juicing green vegetables and fruits.
taste: You taste the fresh, earthy flavours of the vegetables complemented by the sweetness of the fruits, making for a revitalising, health-boosting drink.

desc_desc: A lemon-lime flavoured, caffeine-free soft drink.
taste: You taste the effervescent tanginess of lemon and lime, offering a clear, crisp, and refreshing beverage.

desc_desc: A cocktail made by muddling sugar with bitters, adding whiskey, and garnishing with a twist of citrus rind.
taste: You taste the strong, full-bodied whiskey sweetened slightly and balanced by the aromatic bitters.

desc_desc: A cocktail made with gin and vermouth, garnished with an olive or a lemon twist
taste: You taste the crisp, clean combination of gin and vermouth, resulting in a sophisticated, dry cocktail with a hint of herbal complexity.

description: A glass of the goblet house red
desc_desc: An alcoholic beverage made from fermented dark grape juice.
taste: You taste the complex notes of fruits, berries, and plums, accompanied by tannins and oak.

desc_desc: A cold beverage made from the fermented juice of apples.
taste: You taste the sweet, tangy apple flavour.

desc_desc: A cocktail consisting of hot coffee, Irish whiskey, and sugar, topped with cream.
taste: You taste the robust coffee and strong, smooth whiskey, sweetened and balanced by the whipped cream, creating a warming, comforting drink.

desc_desc: An Irish dry stout that originated in the brewery of Arthur Guinness.
taste: You taste the rich, creamy notes of chocolate and coffee, creating a smooth, slightly bitter experience that finishes with a hint of caramel.

desc_desc: An American-style pale lager produced by Anheuser-Busch.
taste: You taste the light, crisp, grainy malt flavours with a hint of sweetness.

description: A pint of Sierra Nevada Pale Ale
desc_desc: An American ale with a deep amber color and an exceptionally full-bodied, complex character.
taste: You taste the rich, fruity, and resinous pine flavours derived from the generous use of whole-cone American hops.

desc_desc: A Belgian pilsner, known for its distinctive chalice and skunky aroma.
taste: You taste the grainy malts, slightly sweet with a crisp, bitter finish, making it a refreshing and popular choice worldwide.

desc_desc: An American witbier brewed with Valencia orange peel for a subtle sweetness and bright, citrus aroma.
taste: You taste the fruity, tangy orange and coriander notes with a hint of creamy oats, creating a balanced and refreshing beer.

desc_desc: A globally recognised carbonated soft drink with a distinct, richly-sweet flavour.
taste: You taste the bubbly, caramel sweetness combined with a mild hint of vanilla and a slight tang, making it a universally appealing refreshment.

desc_desc: A no-sugar, no-calorie version of the popular Coca-Cola soft drink.
taste: You taste the recognisable cola flavour with a less sweet, slightly sharper profile, making it a lighter refreshment option.
You taste the cool, clean, and pure essence of water, providing a crisp, refreshing finish.

desc_desc: A cocktail made with whiskey, lemon juice, sugar, and optionally, a dash of egg white.
taste: You taste the potent, smoky whiskey perfectly balanced by the tangy, refreshing lemon, creating a sophisticated, smooth cocktail.

description: A glass of the Goblet house white
desc_desc: Wine made from the fermentation of non-coloured grape pulps.
taste: You taste the lighter, crisp notes of green apple, pear, and citrus, with hints of  oak.

desc_desc: A cocktail containing vodka, tomato juice, and combinations of other spices and flavorings including Worcestershire sauce, hot sauces, garlic, herbs, horseradish, celery, olives, salt, black pepper, lemon juice, and celery salt.
taste: You taste the robust, savory blend of spicy, tangy, and salty flavours, creating a hearty, almost meal-like cocktail.

description: A pint of Samuel Adams Boston Lager
desc_desc: An American lager that offers a rich, robust flavour from a complex blend of malts and hops.
taste: You taste the balance of malty sweetness contrasted by hoppy bitterness, producing a full, rounded flavour.
